channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Jan. 6 rioter pardoned by Trump was sentenced to life in prison for child sex abuse
item.description: Since receiving presidential pardons, dozens of former Capitol rioters have gotten into more legal trouble. In Florida, Andrew Paul Johnson was senten...

item.title: Can a digital tablet cut back a country's overuse of antibiotics?
item.description: Overprescribing antibiotics breeds antibiotic resistance. A new tool aims to lower a notably high rate of such prescriptions in Rwanda.

item.title: They were led off course in a big race. But a fix is more complicated than prize money
item.description: Top finishers in the Atlanta half marathon are calling for U.S. track officials to ensure that Jess McClain and two other athletes aren't excluded fro...

item.title: After Apalachee High School Shooting, a Hunger for Accountability
item.description: The country is casting an ever wider net in its search for accountability after mass shootings. Charging parents is an emerging tactic.

item.title: How $800 Monthly Car Payments Are Hurting Car Sales
item.description: Cars have become so expensive that many Americans are putting off or not buying new cars, hurting the auto industry.

item.title: Trump fires Kristi Noem as DHS chief, names Sen. Markwayne Mullin to replace her
item.description: President Trump has fired his homeland security secretary, Kristi Noem, and said Markwayne Mullin, a senator from Oklahoma, would replace her.

item.title: FEMA Delays Under Kristi Noem Angered Republicans
item.description: Long delays in FEMA assistance brought bipartisan complaints, especially in North Carolina after Hurricane Helene in 2024.

item.title: Travel industry pushes Congress to end DHS shutdown and pay federal security workers
item.description: With the busy spring break travel season looming, travel and aviation industry leaders urged Congress to end the stalemate over DHS funding before wor...

item.title: Nature Report, Killed by Trump, Is Released Independently
item.description: A draft assessment of the health of nature in the United States is grim but shot through with bright spots and possibility.

item.title: Politicians Are Trying to Control the News
item.description: The rising global attacks on the free press reveal increasingly desperate regimes attempting to snuff out attempts to find the truth.

item.title: Desperate travelers wait as Dubai resumes a few flights.
item.description: As Iranian missile strikes continue to the U.A.E., stranded passengers at Dubai International Airport anxiously await a way back home.

item.title: Trump Says He Should Have Role in Picking Iran’s Leader
item.description: The president’s comments were the most explicit he has been yet about his vision of an American role in creating a new government in Tehran.

item.title: Why Torpedoed Iranian Warship Is a Problem for India
item.description: An Iranian ship had been invited by India to take part in peacetime naval exercises with dozens of other countries, days before it was sunk in a U.S. ...

item.title: Live Updates: Trump Says He Should Have Role in Picking Iran’s Leader
item.description: Israel threatened more strikes in Lebanon as the Middle East crisis spilled beyond Iran. Italy pledged air defense weapons to help Gulf nations defend...

item.title: Israel Pushes Farther Into Lebanon, and Readies for More
item.description: Days into its offensive against Hezbollah, Israel is massing armored vehicles near the Lebanese border for a potentially much larger ground incursion.
